prompt.en: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body anime-style character illustration of Feng Ku Lao Shen, a 35-year-old underground archive seal warden. He is an extremely bulky, powerful adult male with very broad shoulders, thick chest, narrow strong waist, massive forearms, strong thighs, warm wheat skin, a broad rectangular face, short neat jaw stubble, a short paper-cut scar above the right eyebrow, black short hair combed back with tiny cold-silver highlights, and cold gray-blue narrow eyes. Expression: controlled and serious, mouth line pressed flat, gaze forward as if checking someone's archive access permission. IMPORTANT COSTUME REQUIREMENT: he must wear a clean tight white long-sleeve work shirt that wraps the torso closely; through the fitted white fabric, the contour of his pectorals and abdominal muscles must be clearly readable with tasteful cel-shaded cloth tension, wrinkles, and shadows. The shirt is opaque, dry, non-transparent, and not wet; no bare torso, no exposed abdomen, no nipples, no skin showing through fabric. Outfit: no outerwear, no jacket, no vest, no robe, no cloak, no open shirt; clean tight white long-sleeve archive work shirt tucked into high-waist ink-black straight work pants; wide-toe low archive patrol shoes; one ink-black sealing glove and the other hand wrapped with a white wrist wrap; an old-silver archive key tag close to the collar; a narrow ink-black utility belt carrying a wax-seal case, a heavy seal stamp, and a short key ring. Props/action: he holds a heavy dark-red wax seal stamp and a string of old-silver archive keys, standing like he is guarding a sealed archive door. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained low-glow cold-blue seal marks on the archive key tag, seal stamp edge, and belt tags; compact and tidy, no strong aura. Use the uploaded style reference only for drawing language: very bulky adult male body proportion, clean linework, cel-shaded coloring, and simple readable shadows. Do not copy the reference character identity, face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or background. Material language: clean anime color blocks, crisp outline, simple cel-shaded muscles and cloth folds, clear tight-shirt abdominal contour under opaque fabric, simplified metal and wax accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no photoreal muscle rendering, no glossy leather, no wet shirt, no translucent fabric, no torn clothing, no dust, no grime, no gritty industrial mood, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: clean anime game character concept art, strong readable silhouette, cutout-ready asset. Composition: single standing character, centered, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping. Background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no chart, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no unrelated objects as the main subject, no watermark. Do not use #00ff00 or similar green anywhere on the character.
prompt.cn: 只画一个人物：封库老沈，35岁男性，地下档案封签护库员。非常壮、非常厚实的成年男性，极宽肩、厚胸、强壮收紧的腰、巨大前臂、强壮大腿，暖麦色皮肤，宽长方脸，整齐短胡茬，右眉上方短浅纸割旧痕，黑色短发向后梳，带少量冷银灰高光，冷灰蓝窄眼。表情克制严肃，嘴线压平，像在判断对方是否有查阅权限。服装硬性要求：必须穿干净白色紧身长袖工作衣，白衣紧密包裹胸腹；隔着不透明的白色布料必须能清楚读出胸肌和腹肌轮廓，用克制的赛璐璐布料张力、褶皱和阴影表现。衣服是不透明、干燥、不湿身、不透肉；不要裸露躯干、不要露腹、不要露点、不要透视。服装：无外套，不要夹克、马甲、长袍、披风、开襟衬衫；干净白色紧身长袖档案库工作衣扎进墨黑高腰直筒工装长裤；宽头低帮档案巡守鞋；一只墨黑封签手套，另一只手缠白色护腕；领口附近旧银档案钥匙牌；窄墨黑工具腰带挂封蜡匣、沉重印章和短钥匙串。道具是深红封蜡印章和旧银档案钥匙串，姿态像在守住密档库封门。幻想锚点很克制，只在钥匙牌、印章边缘和腰带标签有少量冷蓝低光封签纹，不要强光。使用上传参考图只作为画风、厚重成年男性体型比例、干净线条和赛璐璐上色参考，不复制参考图人物身份、脸、服装、姿势、道具、颜色或背景。材质是干净动画色块、清晰线条、简单赛璐璐肌肉和布料褶皱，重点是紧身白衣下清楚但克制的腹肌轮廓；不要写实布料纹理、不要油亮皮革、不要湿衣、不要透明布料、不要破衣、不要脏污工业风。干净动画游戏立绘，单人居中全身，从头到鞋完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #00ff00 平面绿幕。

forbidden: profile attributes appended directly to image prompt
generation notes appended directly to image prompt

chromaKey.name: green
chromaKey.reason: The final image prompt explicitly specifies this chroma-key color, so it overrides automatic color inference.
